intent: Write a 'minimum effective dose' fitness-recovery kit recommendation combining storefront products with community wisdom about diminishing returns. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the sports-outdoors and health-household categories and collect at least 4 recovery-related products (foam roller, massage tool, muscle-rub, compression item). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/science for posts on evidence for common recovery tools vs placebos. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present 4 picks with stats, (b) tier them by community-judged evidence strength, (c) close with a minimum-effective-dose $50 kit. Cite every claim.
